__CACHE),t=ot(i,I,"input",e.redeemScript||Gu(e.finalScriptSig),e.witnessScript||Nu(e.finalScriptWitness)),g=t.type==="raw"?"":t.type+"-",r=OC(t.meaningfulScript);return g+r}inputHasPubkey(I,e){let i=(0,uA.checkForInput)(this.data.inputs,I);return Hu(e,i,I,this.__CACHE)}inputHasHDKey(I,e){let i=(0,uA.checkForInput)(this.data.inputs,I),t=yC(e);return!!i.bip32Derivation&&i.bip32Derivation.some(t)}outputHasPubkey(I,e){let i=(0,uA.checkForOutput)(this.data.outputs,I);return Mu(e,i,I,this.__CACHE)}outputHasHDKey(I,e){let i=(0,uA.checkForOutput)(this.data.outputs,I),t=yC(e);return!!i.bip32Derivation&&i.bip32Derivation.some(t)}validateSignaturesOfAllInputs(I){return(0,uA.checkForInput)(this.data.inputs,0),Je(this.data.inputs.length).map(i=>this.validateSignaturesOfInput(i,I)).reduce((i,t)=>t===!0&&i,!0)}validateSignaturesOfInput(I,e,i){let t=this.data.inputs[I];return(0,v.isTaprootInput)(t)?this.validateSignaturesOfTaprootInput(I,e,i):this._validateSignaturesOfInput(I,e,i)}_validateSignaturesOfInput(I,e,i){let t=this.data.inputs[I],g=(t||{}).partialSig;if(!t||!g||g.length<1)throw new Error("No signatures to validate");if(typeof e!="function")throw new Error("Need validator function to validate signatures");let r=i?g.filter(B=>B.pubkey.equals(i)):g;if(r.length<1)throw new Error("No signatures for this pubkey");let n=[],o,Q,E;for(let B of r){let c=gI.signature.decode(B.signature),{hash:f,script:D}=E!==c.hashType?FC(I,Object.assign({},t,{sighashType:c.hashType}),this.__CACHE,!0):{hash:o,script:Q};E=c.hashType,o=f,Q=D,NC(B.pubkey,D,"verify"),n.push(e(B.pubkey,f,c.signature))}return n.every(B=>B===!0)}validateSignaturesOfTaprootInput(I,e,i){let t=this.data.inputs[I],g=(t||{}).tapKeySig,r=(t||{}).tapScriptSig;if(!t&&!g&&!(r&&!r.length))throw new Error("No signatures to validate");if(typeof e!="function")throw new Error("Need validator function to validate signatures");i=i&&(0,v.toXOnly)(i);let n=i?gr(I,t,this.data.inputs,i,this.__CACHE):yu(I,t,this.data.inputs,this.__CACHE);if(!n.length)throw new Error("No signatures for this pubkey");let o=n.find(E=>!E.leafHash),Q=0;if(g&&o){if(!e(o.pubkey,o.hash,HC(g)))return!1;Q++}if(r)for(let E of r){let B=n.find(c=>E.pubkey.equals(c.pubkey));if(B){if(!e(E.pubkey,B.hash,HC(E.signature)))return!1;Q++}}return Q>0}signAllInputsHD(I,e=[EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_ALL]){if(!I||!I.publicKey||!I.fingerprint)throw new Error("Need HDSigner to sign input");let i=[];for(let t of Je(this.data.inputs.length))try{this.signInputHD(t,I,e),i.push(!0)}catch{i.push(!1)}if(i.every(t=>t===!1))throw new Error("No inputs were signed");return this}signAllInputsHDAsync(I,e=[EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_ALL]){return new Promise((i,t)=>{if(!I||!I.publicKey||!I.fingerprint)return t(new Error("Need HDSigner to sign input"));let g=[],r=[];for(let n of Je(this.data.inputs.length))r.push(this.signInputHDAsync(n,I,e).then(()=>{g.push(!0)},()=>{g.push(!1)}));return Promise.all(r).then(()=>{if(g.every(n=>n===!1))return t(new Error("No inputs were signed"));i()})})}signInputHD(I,e,i=[EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_ALL]){if(!e||!e.publicKey||!e.fingerprint)throw new Error("Need HDSigner to sign input");return MC(I,this.data.inputs,e).forEach(g=>this.signInput(I,g,i)),this}signInputHDAsync(I,e,i=[EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_ALL]){return new Promise((t,g)=>{if(!e||!e.publicKey||!e.fingerprint)return g(new Error("Need HDSigner to sign input"));let n=MC(I,this.data.inputs,e).map(o=>this.signInputAsync(I,o,i));return Promise.all(n).then(()=>{t()}).catch(g)})}signAllInputs(I,e){if(!I||!I.publicKey)throw new Error("Need Signer to sign input");let i=[];for(let t of Je(this.data.inputs.length))try{this.signInput(t,I,e),i.push(!0)}catch{i.push(!1)}if(i.every(t=>t===!1))throw new Error("No inputs were signed");return this}signAllInputsAsync(I,e){return new Promise((i,t)=>{if(!I||!I.publicKey)return t(new Error("Need Signer to sign input"));let g=[],r=[];for(let[n]of this.data.inputs.entries())r.push(this.signInputAsync(n,I,e).then(()=>{g.push(!0)},()=>{g.push(!1)}));return Promise.all(r).then(()=>{if(g.every(n=>n===!1))return t(new Error("No inputs were signed"));i()})})}signInput(I,e,i){if(!e||!e.publicKey)throw new Error("Need Signer to sign input");let t=(0,uA.checkForInput)(this.data.inputs,I);return(0,v.isTaprootInput)(t)?this._signTaprootInput(I,t,e,void 0,i):this._signInput(I,e,i)}signTaprootInput(I,e,i,t){if(!e||!e.publicKey)throw new Error("Need Signer to sign input");let g=(0,uA.checkForInput)(this.data.inputs,I);if((0,v.isTaprootInput)(g))return this._signTaprootInput(I,g,e,i,t);throw new Error(`Input #${I} is not of type this.data.updateInput(I,{partialSig:r}),this}_signTaprootInput(I,e,i,t,g=[EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_DEFAULT]){let r=this.checkTaprootHashesForSig(I,e,i,t,g),n=r.filter(Q=>!Q.leafHash).map(Q=>(0,v.serializeTaprootSignature)(i.signSchnorr(Q.hash),e.sighashType))[0],o=r.filter(Q=>!!Q.leafHash).map(Q=>({pubkey:(0,v.toXOnly)(i.publicKey),signature:(0,v.serializeTaprootSignature)(i.signSchnorr(Q.hash),e.sighashType),leafHash:Q.leafHash}));return n&&this.data.updateInput(I,{tapKeySig:n}),o.length&&this.data.updateInput(I,{tapScriptSig:o}),this}signInputAsync(I,e,i){return Promise.resolve().then(()=>{if(!e||!e.publicKey)throw new Error("Need Signer to sign input");let t=(0,uA.checkForInput)(this.data.inputs,I);return(0,v.isTaprootInput)(t)?this._signTaprootInputAsync(I,t,e,void 0,i):this._signInputAsync(I,e,i)})}signTaprootInputAsync(I,e,i,t){return Promise.resolve().then(()=>{if(!e||!e.publicKey)throw new Error("Need Signer to sign input");let g=(0,uA.checkForInput)(this.data.inputs,I);if((0,v.isTaprootInput)(g))return this._signTaprootInputAsync(I,g,e,i,t);throw new Error(`Input #${I} is not of type Taproot.`)})}_signInputAsync(I,e,i=[EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_ALL]){let{hash:t,sighashType:g}=kC(this.data.inputs,I,e.publicKey,this.__CACHE,i);return Promise.resolve(e.sign(t)).then(r=>{let n=[{pubkey:e.publicKey,signature:gI.signature.encode(r,g)}];this.data.updateInput(I,{partialSig:n})})}async _signTaprootInputAsync(I,e,i,t,g=[EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_DEFAULT]){let r=this.checkTaprootHashesForSig(I,e,i,t,g),n=[],o=r.filter(E=>!E.leafHash)[0];if(o){let E=Promise.resolve(i.signSchnorr(o.hash)).then(B=>({tapKeySig:(0,v.serializeTaprootSignature)(B,e.sighashType)}));n.push(E)}let Q=r.filter(E=>!!E.leafHash);if(Q.length){let E=Q.map(B=>Promise.resolve(i.signSchnorr(B.hash)).then(c=>({tapScriptSig:[{pubkey:(0,v.toXOnly)(i.publicKey),signature:(0,v.serializeTaprootSignature)(c,e.sighashType),leafHash:B.leafHash}]})));n.push(...E)}return Promise.all(n).then(E=>{E.forEach(B=>this.data.updateInput(I,B))})}checkTaprootHashesForSig(I,e,i,t,g){if(typeof i.signSchnorr!="function")throw new Error(`Need Schnorr Signer to sign taproot input #${I}.`);let r=gr(I,e,this.data.inputs,i.publicKey,this.__CACHE,t,g);if(!r||!r.length)throw new Error(`Can not sign for input #${I} with the key ${i.publicKey.toString("hex")}`);return r}toBuffer(){return ir(this.__CACHE),this.data.toBuffer()}toHex(){return ir(this.__CACHE),this.data.toHex()}toBase64(){return ir(this.__CACHE),this.data.toBase64()}updateGlobal(I){return this.data.updateGlobal(I),this}updateInput(I,e){return e.witnessScript&&rt(e.witnessScript),(0,v.checkTaprootInputFields)(this.data.inputs[I],e,"updateInput"),this.data.updateInput(I,e),e.nonWitnessUtxo&&rr(this.__CACHE,this.data.inputs[I],I),this}updateOutput(I,e){let i=this.data.outputs[I];return(0,v.checkTaprootOutputFields)(i,e,"updateOutput"),this.data.updateOutput(I,e),this}addUnknownKeyValToGlobal(I){return this.data.addUnknownKeyValToGlobal(I),this}addUnknownKeyValToInput(I,e){return this.data.addUnknownKeyValToInput(I,e),this}addUnknownKeyValToOutput(I,e){return this.data.addUnknownKeyValToOutput(I,e),this}clearFinalizedInput(I){return this.data.clearFinalizedInput(I),this}};Bt.Psbt=tr;var cu=A=>new gt(A),gt=class{constructor(I=C.from([2,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0])){this.tx=EA.Transaction.fromBuffer(I),uu(this.tx),Object.defineProperty(this,"tx",{enumerable:!1,writable:!0})}getInputOutputCounts(){return{inputCount:this.tx.ins.length,outputCount:this.tx.outs.length}}addInput(I){if(I.hash===void 0||I.index===void 0||!C.isBuffer(I.hash)&&typeof I.hash!="string"||typeof I.index!="number")throw new Error("Error adding input.");let e=typeof I.hash=="string"?(0,tt.reverseBuffer)(C.from(I.hash,"hex")):I.hash;this.tx.addInput(e,I.index,I.sequence)}addOutput(I){if(I.script===void 0||I.value===void 0||!C.isBuffer(I.script)||typeof I.value!="number")throw new Error("Error adding output.");this.tx.addOutput(I.script,I.value)}toBuffer(){return this.tx.toBuffer()}};function au(A,I,e){switch(e){case"pubkey":case"pubkeyhash":case"witnesspubkeyhash":return pC(1,A.partialSig);case"multisig":let i=NA.p2ms({output:I});return pC(i.m,A.partialSig,i.pubkeys);default:return!1}}function ir(A){if(A.__UNSAFE_SIGN_NONSEGWIT!==!1)throw new Error("Not BIP174 compliant, can not export")}function pC(A,I,e){if(!I)return!1;let i;if(e?i=e.map(t=>{let g=Ku(t);return I.find(r=>r.pubkey.equals(g))}).filter(t=>!!t):i=I,i.length>A)throw new Error("Too many signatures");return i.length===A}function GC(A){return!!A.finalScriptSig||!!A.finalScriptWitness}function yC(A){return I=>!(!I.masterFingerprint.equals(A.fingerprint)||!A.derivePath(I.path).publicKey.equals(I.pubkey))}function it(A){if(typeof A!="number"||A!==Math.floor(A)||A>4294967295||A<0)throw new Error("Invalid 32 bit integer")}function hu(A,I,e){let i=I.__FEE_RATE||A.getFeeRate(),t=I.__EXTRACTED_TX.virtualSize(),g=i*t;if(i>=e.maximumFeeRate)throw new Error(`Warning: You are paying around ${(g/1e8).toFixed(8)} in fees, which is ${i} satoshi per byte for a transaction with a VSize of ${t} bytes (segwit counted as 0.25 byte per byte). Use setMaximumFeeRate method to raise your threshold, or pass true to the first arg of extractTransaction.`)}function Ye(A,I){A.forEach(e=>{if((0,v.isTaprootInput)(e)?(0,v.checkTaprootInputForSigs)(e,I):(0,j.checkInputForSig)(e,I))throw new Error("Can not modify transaction, signatures exist.")})}function fu(A){if(!A.sighashType||!A.partialSig)return;let{partialSig:I,sighashType:e}=A;I.forEach(i=>{let{hashType:t}=gI.signature.decode(i.signature);if(e!==t)throw new Error("Signature sighash does not match input sighash type")})}function NC(A,I,e){if(!(0,j.pubkeyInScript)(A,I))throw new Error(`Can not ${e} for this input with the key ${A.toString("hex")}`)}function uu(A){if(!A.ins.every(e=>e.script&&e.script.length===0&&e.witness&&e.witness.length===0))throw new Error("Format Error: Transaction ScriptSigs are not empty")}function Du(A,I){A.ins.forEach(e=>{KC(I,e)})}function KC(A,I){let e=(0,tt.reverseBuffer)(C.from(I.hash)).toString("hex")+":"+I.index;if(A.__TX_IN_CACHE[e])throw new Error("Duplicate input detected.");A.__TX_IN_CACHE[e]=1}function UC(A,I){return(e,i,t,g)=>{let r=A({redeem:{output:t}}).output;if(!i.equals(r))throw new Error(`${I} for ${g} #${e} doesn't match the scriptPubKey in the prevout`)}}var lC=UC(NA.p2sh,"Redeem script"),dC=UC(NA.p2wsh,"Witness script");function SC(A,I,e,i){if(!e.every(GC))throw new Error(`PSBT must be finalized to calculate ${I}`);if(A==="__FEE_RATE"&&i.__FEE_RATE)return i.__FEE_RATE;if(A==="__FEE"&&i.__FEE)return i.__FEE;let t,g=!0;if(i.__EXTRACTED_TX?(t=i.__EXTRACTED_TX,g=!1):t=i.__TX.clone(),TC(e,t,i,g),A==="__FEE_RATE")return i.__FEE_RATE;if(A==="__FEE")return i.__FEE}function wu(A,I,e,i,t,g){let r=OC(e);if(!au(I,e,r))throw new Error(`Can not finalize input #${A}`);return pu(e,r,I.partialSig,i,t,g)}function pu(A,I,e,i,t,g){let r,n,o=lu(A,I,e),Q=g?NA.p2wsh({redeem:o}):null,E=t?NA.p2sh({redeem:Q||o}):null;return i?(Q?n=(0,j.witnessStackToScriptWitness)(Q.witness):n=(0,j.witnessStackToScriptWitness)(o.witness),E&&(r=E.input)):E?r=E.input:r=o.input,{finalScriptSig:r,finalScriptWitness:n}}function kC(A,I,e,i,t){let g=(0,uA.checkForInput)(A,I),{hash:r,sighashType:n,script:o}=FC(I,g,i,!1,t);return NC(e,o,"sign"),{hash:r,sighashType:n}}function FC(A,I,e,i,t){let g=e.__TX,r=I.sighashType||EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_ALL;qC(r,t);let n,o;if(I.nonWitnessUtxo){let B=nt(e,I,A),c=g.ins[A].hash,f=B.getHash();if(!c.equals(f))throw new Error(`Non-witness UTXO hash for input #${A} doesn't match the hash specified in the prevout`);let D=g.ins[A].index;o=B.outs[D]}else if(I.witnessUtxo)o=I.witnessUtxo;else throw new Error("Need a Utxo input item for signing");let{meaningfulScript:Q,type:E}=ot(o.script,A,"input",I.redeemScript,I.witnessScript);if(["p2sh-p2wsh","p2wsh"].indexOf(E)>=0)n=g.hashForWitnessV0(A,Q,o.value,r);else if((0,j.isP2WPKH)(Q)){let B=NA.p2pkh({hash:Q.slice(2)}).output;n=g.hashForWitnessV0(A,B,o.value,r)}else{if(I.nonWitnessUtxo===void 0&&e.__UNSAFE_SIGN_NONSEGWIT===!1)throw new Error(`Input #${A} has witnessUtxo but non-segwit script: ${Q.toString("hex")}`);!i&&e.__UNSAFE_SIGN_NONSEGWIT!==!1&&console.warn(`Warning: Signing non-segwit inputs without the full parent transaction means there is a chance that a miner could feed you incorrect information to trick you into paying large fees. This behavior is the same as Psbt's predecessor (TransactionBuilder - now removed) when signing non-segwit scripts. You are not able to export this Psbt with toBuffer|toBase64|toHex since it is not BIP174 compliant.
*********************
PROCEED WITH CAUTION!
*********************`),n=g.hashForSignature(A,Q,r)}return{script:Q,sighashType:r,hash:n}}function yu(A,I,e,i){let t=[];if(I.tapInternalKey){let r=RC(A,I,i);r&&t.push(r)}if(I.tapScriptSig){let r=I.tapScriptSig.map(n=>n.pubkey);t.push(...r)}return t.map(r=>gr(A,I,e,r,i)).flat()}function RC(A,I,e){let{script:i}=nr(A,I,e);return(0,j.isP2TR)(i)?i.subarray(2,34):null}function HC(A){return A.length===64?A:A.subarray(0,64)}function gr(A,I,e,i,t,g,r){let n=t.__TX,o=I.sighashType||EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_DEFAULT;qC(o,r);let Q=e.map((D,p)=>nr(p,D,t)),E=Q.map(D=>D.script),B=Q.map(D=>D.value),c=[];if(I.tapInternalKey&&!g){let D=RC(A,I,t)||C.from([]);if((0,v.toXOnly)(i).equals(D)){let p=n.hashForWitnessV1(A,E,B,o);c.push({pubkey:i,hash:p})}}let f=(I.tapLeafScript||[]).filter(D=>(0,j.pubkeyInScript)(i,D.script)).map(D=>{let p=(0,Eu.tapleafHash)({output:D.script,version:D.leafVersion});return Object.assign({hash:p},D)}).filter(D=>!g||g.equals(D.hash)).map(D=>{let p=n.hashForWitnessV1(A,E,B,o,D.hash);return{pubkey:i,hash:p,leafHash:D.hash}});return c.concat(f)}function qC(A,I){if(I&&I.indexOf(A)<0){let e=ku(A);throw new Error(`Sighash type is not allowed. Retry the sign method passing the sighashTypes array of whitelisted types. Sighash type: ${e}`)}}function lu(A,I,e){let i;switch(I){case"multisig":let t=Su(A,e);i=NA.p2ms({output:A,signatures:t});break;case"pubkey":i=NA.p2pk({output:A,signature:e[0].signature});break;case"pubkeyhash":i=NA.p2pkh({output:A,pubkey:e[0].pubkey,signature:e[0].signature});break;case"witnesspubkeyhash":i=NA.p2wpkh({output:A,pubkey:e[0].pubkey,signature:e[0].signature});break}return i}function du(A,I,e){let i=e.__TX,t={script:null,isSegwit:!1,isP2SH:!1,isP2WSH:!1};if(t.isP2SH=!!I.redeemScript,t.isP2WSH=!!I.witnessScript,I.witnessScript)t.script=I.witnessScript;else if(I.redeemScript)t.script=I.redeemScript;else if(I.nonWitnessUtxo){let g=nt(e,I,A),r=i.ins[A].index;t.script=g.outs[r].script}else I.witnessUtxo&&(t.script=I.witnessUtxo.script);return(I.witnessScript||(0,j.isP2WPKH)(t.script))&&(t.isSegwit=!0),t}function MC(A,I,e){let i=(0,uA.checkForInput)(I,A);if(!i.bip32Derivation||i.bip32Derivation.length===0)throw new Error("Need bip32Derivation to sign with HD");let t=i.bip32Derivation.map(r=>{if(r.masterFingerprint.equals(e.fingerprint))return r}).filter(r=>!!r);if(t.length===0)throw new Error("Need one bip32Derivation masterFingerprint to match the HDSigner fingerprint");return t.map(r=>{let n=e.derivePath(r.path);if(!r.pubkey.equals(n.publicKey))throw new Error("pubkey did not match bip32Derivation");return n})}function Su(A,I){return NA.p2ms({output:A}).pubkeys.map(i=>(I.filter(t=>t.pubkey.equals(i))[0]||{}).signature).filter(i=>!!i)}function PC(A){let I=0;function e(r){return I+=r,A.slice(I-r,I)}function i(){let r=DC.decode(A,I);return I+=DC.decode.bytes,r}function t(){return e(i())}function g(){let r=i(),n=[];for(let o=0;o<r;o++)n.push(t());return n}return g()}function ku(A){let I=A&EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_ANYONECANPAY?"SIGHASH_ANYONECANPAY | ":"";switch(A&31){case EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_ALL:I+="SIGHASH_ALL";break;case EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_SINGLE:I+="SIGHASH_SINGLE";break;case EA.Transaction.SIGHASH_NONE:I+="SIGHASH_NONE";break}return I}function rr(A,I,e){A.__NON_WITNESS_UTXO_BUF_CACHE[e]=I.nonWitnessUtxo;let i=EA.Transaction.fromBuffer(I.nonWitnessUtxo);A.__NON_WITNESS_UTXO_TX_CACHE[e]=i;let t=A,g=e;delete I.nonWitnessUtxo,Object.defineProperty(I,"nonWitnessUtxo",{enumerable:!0,get(){let r=t.__NON_WITNESS_UTXO_BUF_CACHE[g],n=t.__NON_WITNESS_UTXO_TX_CACHE[g];if(r!==void 0)return r;{let o=n.toBuffer();return t.__NON_WITNESS_UTXO_BUF_CACHE[g]=o,o}},set(r){t.__NON_WITNESS_UTXO_BUF_CACHE[g]=r}})}function TC(A,I,e,i){let t=0;A.forEach((o,Q)=>{if(i&&o.finalScriptSig&&(I.ins[Q].script=o.finalScriptSig),i&&o.finalScriptWitness&&(I.ins[Q].witness=PC(o.finalScriptWitness)),o.witnessUtxo)t+=o.witnessUtxo.value;else if(o.nonWitnessUtxo){let E=nt(e,o,Q),B=I.ins[Q].index,c=E.outs[B];t+=c.value}});let g=I.outs.reduce((o,Q)=>o+Q.value,0),r=t-g;if(r<0)throw new Error("Outputs are spending more than Inputs");let n=I.virtualSize();e.__FEE=r,e.__EXTRACTED_TX=I,e.__FEE_RATE=Math.floor(r/n)}function nt(A,I,e){let i=A.__NON_WITNESS_UTXO_TX_CACHE;return i[e]||rr(A,I,e),i[e]}function xC(A,I,e){let{script:i}=nr(A,I,e);return i}function nr(A,I,e){if(I.witnessUtxo!==void 0)return{script:I.witnessUtxo.script,value:I.witnessUtxo.value};if(I.nonWitnessUtxo!==void 0){let t=nt(e,I,A).outs[e.__TX.ins[A].index];return{script:t.script,value:t.value}}else throw new Error("Can't find pubkey in input without Utxo data")}function Hu(A,I,e,i){let t=xC(e,I,i),{meaningfulScript:g}=ot(t,e,"input",I.redeemScript,I.witnessScript);return(0,j.pubkeyInScript)(A,g)}function Mu(A,I,e,i){let t=i.__TX.outs[e].script,{meaningfulScript:g}=ot(t,e,"output",I.redeemScript,I.witnessScript);return(0,j.pubkeyInScript)(A,g)}function Gu(A){if(!A)return;let I=gI.decompile(A);if(!I)return;let e=I[I.length-1];if(!(!C.isBuffer(e)||mC(e)||Uu(e)||!gI.decompile(e)))return e}function Nu(A){if(!A)return;let I=PC(A),e=I[I.length-1];if(!(mC(e)||!gI.decompile(e)))return e}function Ku(A){if(A.length===65){let I=A[64]&1,e=A.slice(0,33);return e[0]=2|I,e}return A.slice()}function mC(A){return A.length===33&&gI.isCanonicalPubKey(A)}function Uu(A){return gI.isCanonicalScriptSignature(A)}function ot(A,I,e,i,t){let g=(0,j.isP2SHScript)(A),r=g&&i&&(0,j.isP2WSHScript)(i),n=(0,j.isP2WSHScript)(A);if(g&&i===void 0)throw new Error("scriptPubkey is P2SH but redeemScript missing");if((n||r)&&t===void 0)throw new Error("scriptPubkey or redeemScript is P2WSH but witnessScript missing");let o;return r?(o=t,lC(I,A,i,e),dC(I,i,t,e),rt(o)):n?(o=t,dC(I,A,t,e),rt(o)):g?(o=i,lC(I,A,i,e)):o=A,{meaningfulScript:o,type:r?"p2sh-p2wsh":g?"p2sh":n?"p2wsh":"raw"}}function rt(A){if((0,j.isP2WPKH)(A)||(0,j.isP2SHScript)(A))throw new Error("P2WPKH or P2SH can not be contained within P2WSH")}function OC(A){return(0,j.isP2WPKH)(A)?"witnesspubkeyhash":(0,j.isP2PKH)(A)?"pubkeyhash":(0,j.isP2MS)(A)?"multisig":(0,j.isP2PK)(A)?"pubkey":"nonstandard"}function Je(A){return[...Array(A).keys()]}});var Ct=u(Z=>{"use strict";s();Object.defineProperty(Z,"__esModule",{value:!0});Z.Transaction=Z.opcodes=Z.Psbt=Z.Block=Z.script=Z.payments=Z.networks=Z.crypto=Z.address=void 0;var Fu=mi();Z.address=Fu;var Ru=xA();Z.crypto=Ru;var qu=kA();Z.networks=qu;var Pu=fe();Z.payments=Pu;var Tu=BA();Z.script=Tu;var xu=BB();Object.defineProperty(Z,"Block",{enumerable:!0,get:function(){return xu.Block}});var mu=bC();Object.defineProperty(Z,"Psbt",{enumerable:!0,get:function(){return mu.Psbt}});var Ou=Xe();Object.defineProperty(Z,"opcodes",{enumerable:!0,get:function(){return Ou.OPS}});var bu=De();Object.defineProperty(Z,"Transaction",{enumerable:!0,get:function(){return bu.Transaction}})});s();var Br=_e(Ct(),1);s();var sA=_e(Ct(),1);s();s();var rI=_e(Ct(),1),ye={P2PKH:0,P2WPKH:1,P2TR:2},or=A=>A.length===32?A:A.slice(1,33),LC=(A,I,e,i)=>{let t=rI.Transaction.fromBuffer(C.from(A.hex,"hex")).outs[A.vout].value;switch(I){case ye.P2TR:return{script:rI.payments.p2tr({internalPubkey:or(e),network:i}).output,value:t};case ye.P2PKH:return{script:rI.payments.p2pkh({pubkey:e,network:i}).output,value:t};case ye.P2WPKH:return{script:rI.payments.p2wpkh({pubkey:e,network:i}).output,value:t};default:return}};function VC(A,I){try{let e=rI.address.fromBase58Check(A).version;if(e===I.pubKeyHash)return ye.P2PKH;if(e===I.scriptHash)return}catch{try{let e=rI.address.fromBech32(A).version;if(e===0)return ye.P2WPKH;if(e===1)return ye.P2TR}catch{}}}function Lu(A,I,e){let i=[A,sA.script.OPS.OP_CHECKSIG,sA.script.OPS.OP_FALSE,sA.script.OPS.OP_IF,C.from("ord","utf8"),1,1,C.from(I,"utf8"),0];for(let t=0;t<e.length;t+=240)i.push(e.subarray(t,Math.min(t+240,e.length)));return i.push(sA.script.OPS.OP_ENDIF),sA.script.compile(i)}function Vu(A,I,e){return sA.payments.p2tr({internalPubkey:I,redeem:{output:A,redeemVersion:192},scriptTree:[{output:A},{output:A}],network:e})}async function Yu({payment:A,feeRate:I,toAddress:e,xOnlyPubKey:i,signPsbt:t,network:g}){let r=new sA.Psbt({network:g});return r.addInput({hash:C.alloc(32),index:0,tapInternalKey:i,witnessUtxo:{script:A.output,value:1100},tapLeafScript:[{leafVersion:A.redeem.redeemVersion,script:A.redeem.output,controlBlock:A.witness[A.witness.length-1]}]}),r.addOutput({address:e,value:1e3}),sA.Psbt.fromBase64(await t(r.toBase64(),!0)).extractTransaction(!0).virtualSize()*I}async function Ju({psbt:A,feeRate:I,signPsbt:e}){return A.addOutput({address:A.txOutputs[0].address,value:0}),sA.Psbt.fromBase64(await e(A.toBase64())).extractTransaction(!0).virtualSize()*I}async function vu({toAddress:A,contentType:I,data:e,feeRate:i,getUtxos:t,publicKey:g,signPsbt:r,network:n,fromAddress:o}){let Q=or(g),E=VC(o,n),B=Lu(Q,I,e),c=Vu(B,Q,n),D=await Yu({payment:c,feeRate:i,toAddress:A,xOnlyPubKey:Q,signPsbt:r,network:n})+1e3,p=await t(D);if(!p||!Array.isArray(p)||p.length===0)throw new Error("Insufficient funds");if(p.length>500)throw new Error("Too many UTXOs. Consolidate first.");let l=p.reduce((oI,JC)=>oI+JC.value,0),H=new sA.Psbt({network:n});for(let oI of p)H.addInput({hash:oI.txid,index:oI.vout,witnessUtxo:LC(oI,E,g,n),nonWitnessUtxo:C.from(oI.hex,"hex")});H.addOutput({address:c.address,value:D});let J=await Ju({psbt:H.clone(),feeRate:i,signPsbt:r}),M=l-D-J;if(M>=1e3)H.addOutput({address:o,value:M});else if(M<0)throw new Error(`Insufficient funds: have ${l}, need ${D+J}`);let K=sA.Psbt.fromBase64(await r(H.toBase64())).extractTransaction(!0),T=new sA.Psbt({network:n});T.addInput({hash:K.getId(),index:0,witnessUtxo:{script:c.output,value:D},tapLeafScript:[{leafVersion:192,script:B,controlBlock:c.witness[c.witness.length-1]}],tapInternalKey:Q}),T.addOutput({address:A,value:1e3});let nI=sA.Psbt.fromBase64(await r(T.toBase64(),!0)).extractTransaction(!0);return{fundTxHex:K.toHex(),revealTxHex:nI.toHex(),inscriptionId:`${nI.getId()}i0`}}var _u=Br.networks.bellcoin,Wu=Br.networks.testnet;function Hp(A){switch(String(A)){case"bells-mainnet":case"bellsMainnet":case"mainnet":return _u;case"bells-testnet":case"bellsTestnet":case"testnet":return Wu;default:throw new Error(`Unknown Bells network key: ${A}`)}}export{_u as BELLS_MAINNET,Wu as BELLS_TESTNET,vu as inscribe,Hp as networkForKey};
//# sourceMappingURL=pokebells-inscriber.browser.mjs.map
